# Digital Realty

**Category:** AI Colocation / GPU Hosting Partners
**Website:** https://www.digitalrealty.com/

## Headline
Global colocation and infrastructure platform with broad AI-relevant footprint and established enterprise reach.

## Overview
Digital Realty helps buyers assess colocation and GPU hosting alternatives when build-vs-buy decisions are central. It is especially relevant for teams that need market coverage, standardized operations, and enterprise-grade service structures in early-stage AI infrastructure planning.

## Key capabilities
- mature colocation footprint and ecosystem coverage
- GPU-focused enterprise infrastructure options
- operational consistency and managed environment controls

## Best fit for
- buyers evaluating alternative models to on-prem modular buildouts
- teams needing immediate geographic coverage and access speed
- companies prioritizing operational predictability over full physical control

## Considerations
Given the platform breadth, this should be reviewed as a category alternative and compared against modular timeline, control, and cost tradeoffs.
